en: Welcome to Zingy study with new phrasal verb grow up and grow on
First of all, let's talk about phrasal verb grow up
Grow up means to grow up
Sentence is she grew up in Mumbai
Next is you need to grow up
Here grow up does not mean to grow up
Grow up means to be more mature and more improvement
Grow on means to take more root or to get more control
Means you don't like something in the beginning but slowly you start liking it
For example, I did not like taste of cold drink at first but it's really grown on me
Initially when I drank cold drink, I didn't like its taste
But in reality it has taken root in me
